name: Douglas Fairbanks Jr.
description: American actor and United States naval officer (1909–2000)
abstract: Douglas Elton Fairbanks Jr. (December 9, 1909 – May 7, 2000) was an American actor, producer, and United States Navy officer.

about_quotes.speaker: Holman Bill
about_quotes.evidence: I met Douglas Fairbanks, Jr., even, and was intrigued by the fact that he wore a necktie for a belt.
about_quotes.doc_title: Holman Bill — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Harry Edison
about_quotes.evidence: But they had a different artist every week to emcee the show, like Douglas Fairbanks, Jr. He would emcee the show one week.
